sections.paragraph:
fem.-

(1) i.q. קָו a rope, Jos 2:18, 21 Jos 2:21from the root קָוָה No. I.

(2) expectation, hope (from קִוָּה to expect. Rth 1:12 Job 5:16 5:6 Zec 9:12, אֲסִירֵי הַתִּקְוָה “the captives cherishing hope.” As to the words, Job 6:8, see וְ note, p. 235, B .

(3) [Tikvah], pr.n. masc. 2Ki 22:14 for which there is in the parallel place, 2Ch 34:22, תֹּוקַחַת כתיב ;תָּקְהַת (obedience, from the root יָקַהּ).
